# Packages for the Hyprland desktop stack on Debian/Ubuntu.
# Consume with: xargs -a deps/packages.apt.txt sudo apt install -y

hyprland
waybar
quickshell
fuzzel
hyprlock
hypridle
xdg-desktop-portal-hyprland
xsettingsd
gvfs
polkit-gnome
btop
cava
grim
slurp
wl-clipboard
brightnessctl
playerctl
network-manager-gnome
blueman

# Notes:
# - quickshell may not be in Debian/Ubuntu official repos. Check
#   https://github.com/quickshell-mirror/quickshell for install options.
# - hyprland is in Debian 13+ and Ubuntu 25.04+ repos. Older versions
#   need an external PPA or building from source.
# - We use network-manager-gnome (no gtk-3/gtk-4 in the list because
#   network-manager-gnome already pulls GTK as a dependency).
